extraction.one_line_summary: NIZZOLO Giacomo won from reduced bunch after QUINTANA Nairo crashed mid-stage losing 1:26, while SCHACHMANN extended GC lead via intermediate bonus orchestration.
tactical_patterns: SAGAN Peter executed lead-out then brake-checked to gift SCHACHMANN 3-second intermediate bonus, revealing domestique role prioritization
QUINTANA Nairo's crash at 25km remaining triggered no team wait from peloton, exposing lack of GC respect
NIBALI Vincenzo gained 20 seconds on PINOT group in final kilometer despite not winning, showing positioning superiority
BENNETT Sam abandoned sprint prep to pace ALAPHILIPPE back after crash, confirming pure GC protection over stage hunting

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: Operated pure super-domestique role with technical intermediate sprint manipulation for SCHACHMANN, signals complete team hierarchy acceptance
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Lost 1:26 from mid-race crash with only brother DAYER waiting, race effectively over at stage 2
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: Gained 18 seconds on PINOT despite fatigued sprint finish, positioning skills intact for GC upset potential
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: positive: Extended GC lead through intermediate bonus manipulation and team-protected final, showing tactical maturity beyond domestique reputation
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Lost 1:26 in same crash group as QUINTANA, required BENNETT sprint sacrifice for damage limitation
rider_signals.NIZZOLO Giacomo: positive: Timed exhausted sprint perfectly behind ACKERMANN's premature effort, patience tactic crucial at 23rd career win with only 2 WT victories
